nasb.text: Has not the Scripture said that the Christ comes from the descendants of David, and from Bethlehem, the village where David was?”

esv.text: Has not the Scripture said that the Christ comes from the offspring of David, and comes from Bethlehem, the village where David was?”

cnv.text: 聖經不是說基督是大衛的後裔，是從大衛本鄉伯利恆出來的嗎？”

ccb.text: 圣经上不是说基督是大卫的后裔，要降生在大卫的故乡伯利恒吗？”

csbs.text: 经上不是说，基督是大卫的后裔，是出自大卫的故乡伯利恒吗？”
